title: pennilabium pumilio
intro: Pennilabium pumilio, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. Traditionally, Pennilabium pumilio has been used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Pennilabium pumilio typically involve drying the roots and leaves to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
